languages.text: "Да вот уж много тут всякого ядовитого растет. Но яд, Ваша Светлость, можно пустить на размягчители, лекарства и всякую полезность. А если правильно смешать, так и сонная вода выйдет. Иногда сильно нужна, особенно после плохих дней в корнях".

"Plenty of poisonous menaces growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents, medicine, and all sorts of useful things. And if you mix it right, you can even make sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."
languages.original_text: "Да вот уж много тут всякого ядовитого растет. Но яд, Ваша Светлость, можно пустить на размягчители, лекарства и всякую полезность. А если правильно смешать, так и сонная вода выйдет. Иногда сильно нужна, особенно после плохих дней в корнях".

traits.locale_text: "Plenty of poisonous stuff growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents medicine, and all sorts of useful things. If you mix it right, you even get sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."

"Plenty of poisonous stuff growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents, medicine, and all sorts of useful things. And if you mix it right, you can even make sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."

"There are many things here that are poisonous or toxic. But it's also because poisons can be used as softening agents, disinfectants, and medicines, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. A couple of years ago, one sergeant worked out how to mix them together and which of the saints to pray to while doing it."

"Plenty of poisonous stuff growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents medicine, and all sorts of useful things. If you mix it right, you even get sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."

"Plenty of poisonous stuff growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents, medicine, and all sorts of useful things. And if you mix it right, you can even make sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."

"Plenty of poisonous menaces growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents, medicine, and all sorts of useful things. And if you mix it right, you can even make sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."

languages.text: 「毒や有害なものはたくさんあるけれど、毒は軟化剤や消毒剤、薬にもなるからな。毒を混ぜる方法や、混ぜる時に祈る聖人を、一人の軍曹が数年前、編み出したんだ」
languages.original_text: "There are many things here that are poisonous or toxic. But it's also because poisons can be used as softening agents, disinfectants, and medicines, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. A couple of years ago, one sergeant worked out how to mix them together and which of the saints to pray to while doing it."

languages.text: "Buralarda bir sürü zehirli şey yetişiyor. Fakat {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Zehirler; yumuşatıcı, ilaç ve her türlü yararlı şey olarak kullanılabilir. Eğer doğru karıştırırsanız uyku suyu bile yapabilirsiniz. Bazen ona çok ihtiyacımız oluyor, özellikle de köklerin arasında geçirdiğimiz zorlu günlerden sonra."
languages.original_text: "Plenty of poisonous stuff growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents, medicine, and all sorts of useful things. And if you mix it right, you can even make sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."

traits.locale_text: "Buralarda bir sürü zehirli şey yetişiyor. Fakat {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Zehirler; yumuşatıcı, ilaç ve her türlü yararlı şey olarak kullanılabilir. Eğer doğru karıştırırsanız uyku suyu bile yapabilirsiniz. Bazen ona çok ihtiyacımız oluyor, özellikle de köklerin arasında geçirdiğimiz zorlu günlerden sonra."

languages.text: “这里长着大把有毒的东西。不过大人，毒素能当软化剂用，当药使，还有各种各样的用处。而且，只要调配得好，甚至能做出睡眠水来。有时候我们很需要这种水，尤其是在根系区折腾了好些天后。”
languages.original_text: "Plenty of poisonous stuff growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents, medicine, and all sorts of useful things. And if you mix it right, you can even make sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."

traits.locale_text: “这里长着大把有毒的东西。不过大人，毒素能当软化剂用，当药使，还有各种各样的用处。而且，只要调配得好，甚至能做出睡眠水来。有时候我们很需要这种水，尤其是在根系区折腾了好些天后。”

languages.text: "Hier wächst eine Menge giftiges Zeug. Aber Gifte können auch zur Schmerzlinderung oder als Medikamente eingesetzt und für allerlei andere Zwecke verwendet werden, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wenn die Mischung stimmt, könnt Ihr sogar Schlafwasser herstellen. Das brauchen wir ab und an dringend, vor allem nach einigen harten Tagen in den Wurzeln."
languages.original_text: "Plenty of poisonous stuff growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents, medicine, and all sorts of useful things. And if you mix it right, you can even make sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."

traits.locale_text: "Hier wächst eine Menge giftiges Zeug. Aber Gifte können auch zur Schmerzlinderung oder als Medikamente eingesetzt und für allerlei andere Zwecke verwendet werden, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wenn die Mischung stimmt, könnt Ihr sogar Schlafwasser herstellen. Das brauchen wir ab und an dringend, vor allem nach einigen harten Tagen in den Wurzeln."

languages.text: « Déjà, parce que l'environnement local regorge de plantes vénéneuses, mais aussi et surtout parce que les poisons peuvent servir d'agents adoucissants, de remèdes et de toutes sortes d'autres choses utiles, Votre Seigneurie. On peut même produire de l'eau de sommeil en les mélangeant correctement. Il nous arrive d'en avoir cruellement besoin, surtout après quelques jours difficiles parmi les racines. »
languages.original_text: "Plenty of poisonous stuff growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents, medicine, and all sorts of useful things. And if you mix it right, you can even make sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."

traits.locale_text: « Déjà, parce que l'environnement local regorge de plantes vénéneuses, mais aussi et surtout parce que les poisons peuvent servir d'agents adoucissants, de remèdes et de toutes sortes d'autres choses utiles, Votre Seigneurie. On peut même produire de l'eau de sommeil en les mélangeant correctement. Il nous arrive d'en avoir cruellement besoin, surtout après quelques jours difficiles parmi les racines. »

languages.text: «Hay muchas cosas tóxicas por aquí, pero además es que algunos venenos pueden usarse como suavizantes, medicamentos y todo tipo de cosas útiles, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Si se mezcla bien, puede hacerse incluso agua del sueño. A veces nos hace mucha falta, especialmente después de unos días duros en la raíces».
languages.original_text: "Plenty of poisonous stuff growing around here. But, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, poisons can be used as softening agents, medicine, and all sorts of useful things. And if you mix it right, you can even make sleep-water. Sometimes we need it bad, especially after a rough few days in the roots."

traits.locale_text: «Hay muchas cosas tóxicas por aquí, pero además es que algunos venenos pueden usarse como suavizantes, medicamentos y todo tipo de cosas útiles, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Si se mezcla bien, puede hacerse incluso agua del sueño. A veces nos hace mucha falta, especialmente después de unos días duros en la raíces».
